commands.result: Confirmed local DB tables include records, entities, identity_aliases, do_not_merge, evidence_refs, and blocks_fts.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 data/canonical.db "select count(*) from entities; select count(*) from identity_aliases where kind='entity'; select count(*) from do_not_merge where kind='entity';"
commands.result: Found 2386 entity records, 622 entity aliases in identity_aliases, and 20 entity do-not-merge rows.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(kind,alias,target) as (...) select p.kind,p.alias,p.target, aa.target as existing_alias_target, dn.reason as db_do_not_merge_reason, ra.record_kind alias_kind, rt.record_kind target_kind from pairs p left join identity_aliases aa on aa.kind=p.kind and aa.alias=p.alias left join do_not_merge dn on dn.kind=p.kind and ((dn.record_id_a=p.alias and dn.record_id_b=p.target) or (dn.record_id_a=p.target and dn.record_id_b=p.alias)) left join records ra on ra.record_id=p.alias left join records rt on rt.record_id=p.target;"
commands.result: For all 10 proposed pairs, alias and target materialize as entity records; existing_alias_target and db_do_not_merge_reason were empty.
No proposed alias_id already appears in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
No proposed alias/target pair appears in data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json.
No proposed alias_id appeared in prior Codex identity prep proposals through batch093.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select e.record_id,e.source_id,e.block_id,e.page_number,substr(b.raw_text,1,320) quote from evidence_refs e left join blocks_fts b using(source_id,block_id) where e.record_id in (<batch094 records>) ..."
commands.result: Pulled local evidence refs and block text for the selected records; no external/provider LLM calls were used.
